invectorPackage.name: Invector Third Person Controller - Shooter Template

manualScanCoverage.brawlContent: representative scenes, generated wizard prefabs, UI prefabs, settings, generated Invector migration assets, and InvectorMigrationLab
manualScanCoverage.invectorScenes: covered by automated static YAML scanner
manualScanCoverage.invectorScriptableObjectYaml: covered when YAML; 3 binary/non-YAML assets listed separately

automatedScan.outputDisposition: generated in a temporary validation location; regenerate from the script rather than committing the 8 MB raw report

phase3aValidation.sceneYamlVariance: Unity assigns new local scene object IDs and document order when the generated lab scene is rebuilt; focused tests validate identical intended topology and references.

fullEditMode.execution: plain NUnit work items forced onto Unity main thread 1

rebaselineNotes: The previous 8079959-byte 07D7BBC1 report described the earlier generated pilot and lab bytes.
Candidate, YAML, skipped-file, layer-assignment, and mask-finding counts are unchanged.
Normalized GameObject layer assignments are unchanged. The only normalized mask changes are generated autoCrouchLayer 512 to 0 and generated blockAimLayer 1 to 0.
Builder regeneration changed raw YAML line numbers, local object IDs, and document ordering; the report preserves that evidence metadata, so it also changes the byte hash.
Phase 3B adds three lab course objects: Step and Slope on Ground plus Collision Wall on WorldBlocker. This raises normalized GameObject layer assignments from 9,380 to 9,383.
The three primitive course objects add twelve renderer/collider bitfields and BrawlCamera adds obstructionMask 512, raising mask findings from 14,940 to 14,953 without changing ProjectSettings.
rules: serialized custom tags remain empty; live Ignore Ragdoll presence is neither required nor forbidden, and adapters must not depend on it

hashNotes.ProjectSettings.asset: Re-baselined after the validated Invector define manager added INVECTOR_BASIC, INVECTOR_MELEE, and INVECTOR_SHOOTER and existing user display/mobile/batching changes were present. Phase 0B made no ProjectSettings mutation.
hashNotes.TagManager.asset: Phase 0B approved exactly one additive change: previously unused layer 23 is named InvectorPlayer. The serialized custom-tag list remains empty and no other layer changed. Phase 3A made no settings mutation; its project controller removes the absent AutoCrouch path. Live Ignore Ragdoll presence is neither required nor forbidden, and the input adapter does not depend on it.
